sources.name: Curated official Pokémon publications
sources.permissionNote: Metadata and links are manually recorded from public first-party publications; article bodies are not copied.

sources.name: Dated Canadian storefront observations
sources.permissionNote: Human-verified observations only; this connector does not access or automate a protected storefront.

remoteFeedPolicy.note: Only add feeds whose publisher permits automated retrieval. Comma-separated URLs are optional and no protected storefront is configured by default.
